_comment: Copy to deploy.config.json (gitignored, machine-local). Schema 2: targets are keyed by WINDOWS USER ($env:USERNAME) so each user on this machine can pick their own hosts. 'targets' is the Cinema 4D list (used by deploy.ps1); 'blender_targets' is the OPTIONAL Blender list (used by deploy_blender.ps1) - each entry { blender, addon_dir } where addon_dir is the 'overseer' folder under a Blender version's scripts/addons. Every entry in a list is deployed in one run. The 'deploy' skill in Claude Code fills this interactively. Legacy flat configs ({cinema, location, plugin_dir}) are migrated automatically.
